Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxStorageCapacityHighMB
Added_Other.mechanism: Increases the maximum storage capacity for user data on Roblox servers.
Added_Other.purpose: Allows players to save more game data, improving their experience with larger inventories or game progress.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxStorageCapacityLowMB
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the amount of storage space available for user data.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps manage storage effectively, ensuring players don't run out of space for their game data.
